features: Goes on clear & stays on clear, providing invisible sweat protection
Gel formula for easy application on skin
description: Product Description Gillette Clear Gel Champion Gold Antiperspirant & Deodorant For Men - Don't mask odour, neutralise it. Gillette men's antiperspirant clear gel gives you high performance sweat and odour protection for 72 hours. Its precision engineered formula will keep you fresh all day. Gillette Clear Gel goes on clear and stays on clear, giving you invisible sweat protection that lasts. Ingredients Aluminum Zirconium Octachlorohydrex Gly, Alcohol Denat., Cyclopentasiloxane, Propylene Glycol, Dimethicone, Calcium Chloride, PEG/PPG-18/18 Dimethicone, Parfum, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Coumarin, Citronellol, Citral Directions Clean and dry the armpit before use. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpit. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Repeat if necessary during the day or after physical activity for continuous protection. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
